name: HRC_ALERT_RUN_RANGES
description: Stores alert filters data  for a run.

columns.Name: RUN_RANGE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column

columns.Name: RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Run Identifier. Foreign Key to HRC_ALERTS_RUNS.RUN_ID

columns.Name: PARENT_RUN_RANGE_ID
columns.Comments: Key identifier of the Node data.

columns.Name: RANGE_START
columns.Comments: Alert run range start.

columns.Name: RANGE_END
columns.Comments: Alert run range end.

columns.Name: TOTAL_FETCHED
columns.Comments: Total run range fetched.

columns.Name: TOTAL_QUALIFIED
columns.Comments: Total run range qualified.

columns.Name: TOTAL_DISQUALIFIED
columns.Comments: Total run range disqualified.

columns.Name: CHUNK_NUM
columns.Comments: Chunk Number

columns.Name: RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of Retries.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Alert run range status code.

columns.Name: STATUS_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Alert run range status message.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the start date and time of the run range.

columns.Name: END_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the end date and time of the run range.
